01 — Profile

Professional Overview

Relocation
✓ Willing — Worldwide

I am a Thomas Jefferson Scholar (Snow College, Utah, USA — full merit) and holder of a Bachelor's Degree in Business Management with specialization in Hospitality, Hotel Management, and Food & Beverage from ISET Djerba, Tunisia. My academic journey took me from North Africa to the United States, forging the cross-cultural adaptability that defines great cabin crew.

I hold the Inflight Institute KK-FBDEF (CT401) certification in Wide-Body and Multi-Crew Onboard Operations, alongside an Aviation CRM qualification, First Aid, CPR & AED certification, and HACCP Food Safety training. My Alison Learner Record documents over 476 hours of certified study including a dedicated Diploma in Airline Cabin Crew Service.

In my current role as Hospitality & Service Crew at Big Mama Restaurant (May 2023–present), I manage 40+ orders per service window while maintaining HACCP standards in a multicultural team environment. This mirrors the rhythm and rigor of inflight service precisely.

Immediately available for screening days, assessment centres, and cabin crew training programs. Willing to relocate worldwide without restrictions.

May 2023 — Present
Big Mama Restaurant · Tunisia
Hospitality & Service Crew
